compiled_state.title: Add preconditions-validator-lib entry/exit hooks to COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Overview
Insert the entry and exit validator invocation blocks into COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md. Makes T7's RED tests pass. Entry check reads upstream sprint PRECONDITIONS; exit write emits commit's own PRECONDITIONS event.

## File Impact
- Modify: plugins/dso/docs/workflows/COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md

## Implementation Notes
**Entry section** — insert in Step 0 (Gather Context), after the Breadcrumb Init block:

```bash
# Stage-boundary preconditions entry check (Story 4)
source "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/lib/preconditions-validator-lib.sh" 2>/dev/null || true
_dso_pv_entry_check "commit" "sprint" "${STORY_OR_EPIC_ID:-}" || true
# Fail-open: diagnostic emitted on missing/invalid upstream PRECONDITIONS; commit proceeds
```

**Exit section** — insert in the final step (after review record, before push):

```bash
# Stage-boundary preconditions exit write (Story 4)
_dso_pv_exit_write "commit" "${_UPSTREAM_EVENT_ID:-}" "${DIFF_HASH:-}" "${STORY_OR_EPIC_ID:-}" || true
```

Both fail-open. Zero user interaction.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All 4 tests from T7 PASS after this edit
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-preconditions-commit-validator.sh 2>&1 | grep -v FAIL | grep -q "pass\|ok\|PASS"
- [ ] Entry section references _dso_pv_entry_check with "commit" and "sprint"
  Verify: grep -q '_dso_pv_entry_check.*commit.*sprint\|_dso_pv_entry_check.*"commit"' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/workflows/COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md
- [ ] Exit section references _dso_pv_exit_write with "commit"
  Verify: grep -q '_dso_pv_exit_write.*commit' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/workflows/COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md
- [ ] check-referential-integrity.sh passes
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/check-referential-integrity.sh 2>&1 | grep -v "^$" | tail -1 | grep -qi "ok\|pass\|0 errors"
- [ ] validate.sh --ci passes
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately

comments.body: AC amendment: Verify the ticket ID variable in COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md. The commit workflow may not have a single STORY_OR_EPIC_ID variable — the ticket context may need to be resolved from the staged diff's commit message or from a manually set variable. The validator call should gracefully handle an empty/unset ticket ID (pass empty string; fail-open on missing PRECONDITIONS is already the contract).
comments.author: Test
